$comment: Adaptive-lab blueprint. Variation is AUTHORED and finite; every variant here must pass the CI auto-solve harness before release (ciPolicy). Solutions exist for CI only — they are never shown to learners or the instructor.

rounding-floor.description: applyDiscount silently switched from Math.round to Math.floor under a plausible comment; one named test fails.
solution: const f=require('fs');const p='src/pricing.ts';f.writeFileSync(p,f.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace('  // Floor instead of round so we never overcharge the customer.\n  return Math.floor(discounted);','  return Math.round(discounted);'))

subtotal-accumulation.description: subtotalCents lost its quantity multiplication behind a 'simplified' comment; two tests fail, including the agent's own.
solution: const f=require('fs');const p='src/pricing.ts';f.writeFileSync(p,f.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace("  // Simplified the accumulator while touching this file.\n  return items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPriceCents, 0);","  return items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPriceCents * item.quantity, 0);"))
